title: Problem Children Are Coming From Another World, Aren't They?
sourceNotes: Single-cour anime, 10 episodes (Diomedea, 2013); no sequel seasons, so cumulative episodes = raw episodes. The source is Tarou Tatsunoko's light novel (AniList id 75855, format NOVEL, complete at 12 volumes / listed as 125 chapters). There is no manga used for episode-to-source guides, so this mapping uses LIGHT-NOVEL VOLUME numbers as the 'chapters' unit. The anime adapts LN volumes 1-2: eps 1-5 cover Volume 1 and eps 6-10 cover Volume 2 (confirmed by Wikipedia/fandom). Volumes 3-12 (including the Ouroboros Alliance, Three-Headed Dragon and later arcs) are unadapted; the story continues in the sequel LN series Last Embryo. Per-volume arc boundaries are approximate. A single OVA ("The Hot Spring Fun Trip", 2013) exists but is a non-theatrical bonus episode, so no films are listed.

mappings.arc: Yes! Black Rabbit Called You! — arrival in Little Garden, No Names community, Fores Garo Gift Game & Thousand Eyes, rescuing Leticia from Perseus (LN vol 1)
Oh dear, a Declaration of War by a Demon Lord? — Salamandra's Fire Dragon Birth Festival, the Pied Piper of Hamelin and the Demon Lord Pest (LN vol 2)
Dragon Summoning through the later arcs (Ouroboros Alliance, Three-Headed Dragon, etc.) — LN vols 3-12, unadapted (continued in Last Embryo)
